; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-23
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&6504254477&~
                function onDocumentChanged() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~)
                            ~&233745975898428&~.~&7712989577739634&~ = false;
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
